programme.title: Stagecoach to Denver
programme.desc: Lambert has the stagecoach wrecked killing the Commissioner so his phony replacement can alter Coonskins land survey When Red Ryder exposes the survey hoax Lambert has his stooge Sheriff put Red in jail

programme.title: The One Eyed Soldiers
programme.desc: A doctors unexpected death in a central European republic sets a series of chilling events into motion

programme.title: Bells of San Angelo
programme.desc: Bells of San Angelo

programme.title: Filler
programme.desc: Filler

programme.title: Young Indiana Jones
programme.desc: Young Indiana Jones

programme.title: Filler
programme.desc: Filler

programme.title: Days of Jesse James
programme.desc: A bank robbery pulled off by the bank officials not the usual James gang

programme.title: The Gun and the Pulpit
programme.desc: After narrowly escaping a lynch mob atheist gunslinger Ernie Parsons Marjoe Gortner steals the identity of a murdered preacher and takes his job in a western town Ernie falls for the beautiful Sally Underwood Pamela Sue Martin and becomes attached to the town hes come to think of as his sanctuary So when his new home is threatened by a tyrannical land baron Ernie must use both his extensive skills as a gunfighter and his minimal skills as a preacher to defend the townspeople

programme.title: What Waits Below
programme.desc: An army experiment in submarine communications falls foul of the deadly secret hidden deep within the cave system housing their transmitter

programme.title: Filler
programme.desc: Filler

programme.title: Freddys Nightmares
programme.desc: A scientist whos working on establishing contact with alien life finds his project in jeopardy when his loan shark comes to call Meanwhile another scientist is researching the communicative skills of an intelligent chimp but her arrogant boss seems to have more of an interest in torturing the animal than performing legitimate experiments

programme.title: Tales from the Crypt
programme.desc: Siamese twins one timid and kind-hearted and the other reckless and sadistic must make a decision on whether or not to allow an experimental surgery to have them separated even though one of them doesnt want to be split from the other

programme.title: Tales from the Crypt
programme.desc: A young orphan named Theodores adopted by the odd and well-off Colberts with a dark secret Theyre not the only ones

programme.title: The Hitchhiker
programme.desc: In this black comedy desperate real estate salesman Jake McElhaney tries to convince a magicians strange attractive twin daughters Frances and Priscilla Packard to sell their house

programme.title: The Hitchhiker
programme.desc: Handsome audio engineer Eric Dunlap hired to install his strange top notch sound system with a mind of its own for an egotistical music conductor Kurt Hoffman but falls hard for Hoffmans beautiful neglected wife Veronica

programme.title: Werewolf
programme.desc: Eric seeks help from college professor Dr Victor Degoethels who has written a book about werewolves throughout the ages But Alamo Joe has already warned him about Eric and his crimes

programme.title: Werewolf
programme.desc: Tired and worn out Eric accepts the hospitality of an old man at his home in the woods He becomes attracted to a young woman named Margaret but he fears that he may be responsible for a series of brutal murders in the area

programme.title: Forever Knight
programme.desc: When Nick Knight goes to investigate the alleged suicide of a space scientist he discovers that an asteroid is heading for Earth and is projected to strike within 3 months

programme.title: Friday the 13th The Series
programme.desc: Friday the 13th The Series

programme.title: Dark Night of the Scarecrow
programme.desc: In a small Southern town four vigilantes wrongfully execute a mentally-challenged man but after the court sets them free mysterious accidents begin to kill them off one by one

programme.title: Gomer Pyle USMC
programme.desc: Carter tries for the Officer Candidate School

programme.title: Gomer Pyle USMC
programme.desc: Gomer tries to collect money for Carters birthday

programme.title: Gilligans Island
programme.desc: The castaways discover that they are all wanted for questioning in a murder that took place right before they left Hawaii

programme.title: Gilligans Island
programme.desc: A telephone cable washes up on the island after a bad storm The castaways try to use it to call home for help

programme.title: Real McCoys
programme.desc: The entire family begins to pamper Grampa - much to his displeasure

programme.title: Real McCoys
programme.desc: When Luke fears that he may be losing his hair Grandpa employs an unusual tactic to remind Luke that appearances arent as important as he thinks

programme.title: Get Smart
programme.desc: Agent 99 accepts a marriage proposal from a handsome and wealthy suitor but Max finds out that he is actually a KAOS agent

programme.title: Get Smart
programme.desc: Even during a day off at an amusement park 86 and 99 find a KAOS operation

programme.title: BJ and the Bear
programme.desc: Captain Grant and Lt Steiger set a match to a powder-keg when they abduct BJs best friend Bear BJ and the lady truckers wage war against SCAT just when Grant is trying to woo appropriations funding from an influential state senator

programme.title: Mister Ed
programme.desc: Wilbur lands in a Mexican jail and Mister Ed is the only crime witness that can help to set him free

programme.title: Mister Ed
programme.desc: Mister Eds mother is being used as a plow horse so he begs Wilbur to buy her at auction Carol is dead set against taking in another horse and Roger is dead set against Kay spending any of his money at the auction

programme.title: Hogans Heroes
programme.desc: Carter receives a Dear John letter and wants to join the rest of the prisoners that escape and go home

programme.title: Hogans Heroes
programme.desc: Hogan tricks Klink into calling forth a bomber for study but it arrives with a complication - a German general familiar with Hogans style

programme.title: McHales Navy
programme.desc: McHale and The Crew take in a young orphan girl and go out of their way to make a happy home for her on their island But their extraordinary behavior arouses Binghamtons suspicions and he uses the situation to have the 73 Crew sized up as possible Section 8s by some visiting Psychiatrists

programme.title: McHales Navy
programme.desc: During a mission to investigate the crash site of a Japanese transport plane McHale and The Crew recover 4 million dollars in American cash Thinking that its counterfeit they return to base where Gruber later trades it to Chief Urulu for some native trinkets But when they find out that the money is real - Stolen by the Japs from a bank in The Philippines - Gruber challenges Urulu to a winner-take-all poker game to get it back

programme.title: A Bullet for Pretty Boy
programme.desc: After serving four years of a six-year sentence on a manslaughter charge a tough punk Pretty Boy Floyd escapes from prison and goes on a violent rampage

programme.title: Mikey And Nick
programme.desc: Nicky is on the run from the mob and he turns to old pal Mikey for help

programme.title: Miracle of the White Stallions
programme.desc: In 1945 the fate of Viennas famous Lipizzaner stallions hangs into balance American general Patton could save them but first he asks to see them perform

programme.title: Cell 2455 Death Row
programme.desc: Whit condemned and awaiting execution reviews the events of his life that has brought him to Cell 2455 on San Quentins Death Row a story he had told in a autobiography that became a sensational best-seller As a boy the young Whit stole groceries to help feed his impoverished family later moving on into major crime to impress a young gang moll Jo-Anne and turns into a cold-blooded thug when he is repudiated by the girl he loves Doll And by his own lawyer when he is arrested and tried as the infamous Lovers Lane Bandit In cell 2455 he studies law to the point where he wins stay after stay twice within minutes of his scheduled execution

programme.title: The Disappearance Thriller
programme.desc: Thriller about a contract killer whose wife has disappeared When he is hired by an international organization to carry out a shy or hit he suspects they are connected with her disappearance

programme.title: Filler
programme.desc: Filler

programme.title: Stryker
programme.desc: The worlds water supply has dried up due to some sort of apocalypse A beautiful woman holds the secret to where one of the last springs being guarded by a group of Amazons A Road Warrior like crew captures her and tries to make her talk through brutal torture The hero Styrker unites with some of the remaining good guys and the Amazons and frees the woman

programme.title: Filler
programme.desc: Filler

programme.title: The Dukes of Hazzard
programme.desc: Bo and Luke get jobs hauling wrecked cars to demolition derby operator Augie Detweiller unaware he and Boss have schemed to hide stolen engines under the hood When they are suspected of smuggling the stolen engines into Hazzard Bo agrees to become a driver in an upcoming event to find out the truth

programme.title: Hercules 107
programme.desc: Hercules 107

programme.title: Earth Final Conflict
programme.desc: A college friend of Renees resurfaces and leads them on an investigation of the link between the Taelons and a biomedical facilitys cloning operation

programme.title: War of the Worlds
programme.desc: When a severe heat wave strikes the aliens cut off the citys water supply and exploit a local reverend to drive humans into worshipping the Morthren Eternal

programme.title: Swamp Thing
programme.desc: Wills father an adventurer by trade arrives in town to search for a rare flower

programme.title: Swamp Thing
programme.desc: Arcane injects a dead man with a life-restoring serum that gives him the touch of death

programme.title: Space 1999
programme.desc: After destroying an asteroid on a collision course with the moon an even larger obstacle appears - an entire planet! On a recon mission John Koenig encounters an inhabitant who convinces him- on the basis of faith- that the moon and the planet must collide But no one else supports Koenigs stand

programme.title: Gamera War of the Monsters
programme.desc: Prehistoric monster Gamera returns to wreak havoc on Japan American version of the classic kaiju film Gamera vs Barugon

programme.title: Cheyenne
programme.desc: After a close friend of Cheyenne is killed during the escape of bank robbers Cheyenne and Smitty track the band of outlaws across the border to a small Mexican village The band has taken over the town after killing 14 young men there

programme.title: Young 216
programme.desc: Young 216

programme.title: Lonesome Dove Outlaw Years
programme.desc: Lonesome Dove Outlaw Years

programme.title: The Streets of San Francisco
programme.desc: A 12-year-old girl knows her stepfather murdered her mother But her attempts to unmask him only impede the polices investigation

programme.title: Mission Impossible
programme.desc: An opposition leader of an Eastern Bloc nation has been captured by the chief of the countrys secret police Also seized was microfilm with a list of people who secretly support the opposition Phelps develops a plan that plays upon the astrology obsession the nations leader has Cinnamon poses as a famous astrologer while Barney and Rollin will have to operate from the cargo compartment of a plane transporting the captured opposition leader

programme.title: Dragnet
programme.desc: Joe and Bill are assigned a task to find a purse snatcher They are surprised to learn it is a dog snatching the purses

programme.title: Dragnet
programme.desc: A beat police officer asks Sergeant Friday to be his counselor before a review board The office is accused of accepting a bribe

programme.title: The Fugitive
programme.desc: While waiting to leave a small town in Montana Dr Kimble is spotted by the authorities and arrested He is cleared for having stolen a truck but the sheriff decides to jail him for having resisted arrest and suspects hes not who he says he is While Kimble is held in jail another prisoner determines his true identity

programme.title: Big Valley
programme.desc: An Englishman with a large gambling debt agrees to smuggle whiskey onto an Indian reservation to pay off his losses Enroute he meets up with Victoria on the way to the reservation with medical supplies and they find the road there is full of unexpected surprises

programme.title: What to See And Do
programme.desc: Scenic 30A Drive to Brunos Pizza on 30a near Seaside FL 30a Misfits 30A Amazing Florida Beach Towns Ultimate Tour By Gulf Coast Girl SKYDIVE NW Florida Fantasti"

programme.desc: BeachBilly Lifestyle How to Save Your Seeds for Your Vegetable Garden BeachBilly Lifestyle Feeding Chickens With Lex BeachBilly Lifestyle Hummingbird Zipline Co"

programme.title: Missing in Action 2
programme.desc: Prequel to the first Missing In Action set in the early 1980s it shows the capture of Colonel Braddock during the Vietnam war in the 1970s and his captivity with other American POWs in a brutal prison camp and his plans to escape

programme.title: Missing in Action 3
programme.desc: Braddock mounts a one-man assault to free his wife and son who are still being held in a Vietnam prison camp

programme.title: The Octagon
programme.desc: A martial artist must defeat a plan by ninjas to create a worldwide training camp for terrorists

programme.title: House II The Second Story
programme.desc: A man Arye Gross and his friend Jonathan Stark exhume an ancestor Royal Dano in the house where his parents were killed

programme.title: Highlander
programme.desc: An immortal Scottish swordsman must confront the last of his immortal opponents a murderously brutal barbarian who lusts for the fabled Prize

programme.title: The Hitman
programme.desc: A Cop goes undercover as a Hitman to bring down a criminal organization

programme.title: KILL ROMMEL
programme.desc: During WWII US Lieutenant Morris and British captain Hull are assigned in a mission to kill Rommel

programme.title: Silent Rage
programme.desc: When Sheriff Dan kills a man with a mental illness a team of doctors resuscitates him and makes him invincible Terror fills the town as the revived man sets off on a killing spree

programme.title: Lion of the Desert
programme.desc: Set during the reign of Mussolini this epic tale revolves around Libyan leader Omar Mukhtar Omar an Arab Muslim rebel takes on the Italian attack which is directed towards conquering Libya

programme.desc: Phil Melissa Mitch Mary and Vinnie are high school friends who unwittingly raise the dead on Halloween night Once the dead have returned Pitchford Cove will never be the same againor will it

programme.desc: Out of the Cage reveals the private thoughts and emotions of an MMA fighter, the ambition that drives them and how they are affected when encountering defeat or facing triumph. Featuring Clay Davidson at HK40

programme.title: Hard Knocks
programme.desc: Out of the Cage reveals the private thoughts and emotions of an MMA fighter, the ambition that drives them and how they are affected when encountering defeat or facing triumph. Featuring Nick Ring Hk43

programme.title: Hard Knocks
programme.desc: A private pre-season event held in a secret warehouse in Budapest, Hungary, the inaugural Karate Combat: Genesis event took place on February 3, 2018. The event showcases the incredible depth of the fight roster highlighting many karate legends in various weight classes, competing for the first time ever in this new sporting league.

programme.title: Hard Knocks
programme.desc: Will Quijada v. Sean Kearney

programme.title: Hard Knocks
programme.desc: Pouria Rashidi v. Dominic Dillon

programme.title: Hard Knocks
programme.desc: Live from New York City, NY on Sept. 27, 2018, Karate Combat: One World is the third event of the Karate Combat fighting league's inaugural season. Heldatop the Freedom Tower on the 102nd Floor Observation Deck of One World Trade Center building. On the Main Card: Abdalla Ibrahim of the US/Egypt vs.Dionicio Gustavo of Dominican Republic. The co-main event features Brazil’s Luis Rocha and Dimitris Triantafyllis of Greece. A stacked card of 9 fights also featuresElhadji Ndour, Josh Quayhagen, and newcomers Adilet Shadykanov and Edgars Skrivers.

programme.title: Hard Knocks
programme.desc: Live from New York City, NY on Sept. 27, 2018, Karate Combat: One World is the third event of the Karate Combat fighting league's inaugural season. Heldatop the Freedom Tower on the 102nd Floor Observation Deck of One World Trade Center building. On the Main Card: Abdalla Ibrahim of the US/Egypt vs.Dionicio Gustavo of Dominican Republic. The co-main event features Brazil’s Luis Rocha and Dimitris Triantafyllis of Greece. A stacked card of 9 fights also featuresElhadji Ndour, Josh Quayhagen, and newcomers Adilet Shadykanov and Edgars Skrivers.

programme.title: Hard Knocks
programme.desc: Out of the Cage reveals the private thoughts and emotions of an MMA fighter, the ambition that drives them and how they are affected when encountering defeat or facing triumph. Featuring Ryan Connor HK43.

programme.title: Bleav in Panthers
programme.desc: Panthers great, Running Back Jonathan Stewart, is joined by Tobacco Road Sports Radio's Desmond Johnson, and Schuyler Callihan for weekly analysis on the Carolina Panthers!

programme.title: Bleav in Lions
programme.desc: Former Lions All-Pro Glover Quin and 7-time Emmy winner Trevor Thompson break down all the latest buzz around Dan Campbell, Jared Goff, Jahmyr Gibbs, and the Detroit Lions on the Bleav in Lions podcast.

programme.title: Bleav In Bills
programme.desc: Adam Benigni and Sal Maiorana are two of the most experienced reporters in western New York with more than 70 years of experience covering the Buffalo Bills.

programme.title: The Ruffino & Joe Show
programme.desc: Blake Ruffino and Joe DeLeone join forces to talk about the latest in the SEC and College Football

programme.title: Bleav in Bengals
programme.desc: Solomon Wilcots hits the mics to talk Bengals football. After covering the field for the 'Who Dey?' nation

programme.title: Bleav In Commanders
programme.desc: Welcome to the Bleav in Commanders show hosted by former Washington WR Anthony Armstrong and Scott Jackson .We are proud to be a part of the Bleav Podcast Network! We provide insight on the Washington Commanders to the best fan base in the NFL! All content is for the fans, and by the fans. LET’S GO WASHINGTON!

programme.title: Simms Complete
programme.desc: Football is the Simms family business. Join former NFL QB Matt Simms & Super Bowl MVP Phil Simms as they share unique insight on the game they love.

programme.title: See Ball Get Ball
programme.desc: Hosted by David Pollack, a College Football Hall of Famer, three-time First-Team All-American from the University of Georgia, and first-round NFL Draft pick, this podcast provides honest analysis of the most significant stories, matchups, and moments in the world of college football.

programme.title: Bleav in Giants
programme.desc: The broadcast team of commentator Bob Papa and New York Giants legend Carl Banks bring you weekly analysis on your New York Giants.

programme.title: Bleav in Chargers
programme.desc: The greatest fullback in Chargers history Lorenzo Neal hops on the mic with Chargers Play-By-Play Broadcaster Matt "Money" Smith to talk all things Jim Harbaugh, Justin Herbert, and the Los Angeles Chargers.

programme.title: Bleav in Texans
programme.desc: Bleav in Texans is your go-to podcast for everything Houston Texans, hosted by former NFL wide receiver Cecil Shorts III and former defensive tackle and sports radio host Seth Payne.

programme.title: Bleav in Buckeyes
programme.desc: Former Ohio State Football Players Chimdi Chekwa and Bryant Browning talk all things Buckeyes. THE #1 Ohio State Football Podcast out there talking Ryan Day, CJ Stroud, and the rest of the Grey and Scarlet.

programme.title: Bleav In Rams
programme.desc: Bleav in Rams brings you the Rams' insight and access that only they can. We provide in-depth analysis on Matthew Stafford, Cooper Kupp, Puka Nacua and the rest of the Los Angeles Rams squad hosted by Erin Coscarelli and Tyler Dragon

programme.title: Bleav in Oregon
programme.desc: Bleav in Oregon takes an insider’s look at the world of Oregon Ducks sports With hosts Jonathan Stewart and Zachary Neel. We get an in-depth look at the world of Oregon football and recruiting with a Ducks reporter and University of Oregon alum.

programme.title: Bleav in Broncos
programme.desc: Denver Broncos insiders Patrick Chiotti and Bri Maestas bring you everything you need to know about the team at Mile High. Get insight and analysis on Bo Nix, Patrick Surtain II, Javonte Williams, and the entire Broncos squad. Tune in for recaps, previews, and guest interviews.

programme.title: Irish Breakdown
programme.desc: Irish Breakdown provides unmatched in-depth analysis of the Notre Dame Football program while also discussing hot college football topics.

programme.title: The Florence La Rue Interview
programme.desc: I never really thought I could sing Hear in her own words how singing was the furtherest thing from her mind

programme.desc: Meet the man who created a 90s anthem that set the trend for Hip Hop Music today

programme.title: The Cynda Williams Interview
programme.desc: Meet the lady who became a star in the 1990s hit movie Mo Betta Blues Hear how selling herself out to become rich was and still isnt an option

programme.desc: The Renegades persuade a disgruntled genius to use his new weapon against the Guardians

programme.desc: MASK investigates strange rainfalls on the Nazca Plain caused by VENOM to make the Candelabra glow in the dark and show the way to the legendary Cave of the Winters

programme.title: MASK
programme.desc: A freighter is pulled ashore on Manakara Island and the natives blame the Manakara island When Matt and Gloria investigate T-Bob and Shark soon feel the pull of Manakara as well

programme.title: Captain N The Game Master
programme.desc: In Baseball World Captain N is playing baseball with Bo Jackson until Mother Brain kidnaps Princess Lana and warps Captain N Simon Duke Megaman Kid Icarus and Bo into the cellars How can they get out and save Lana

programme.title: Captain N The Game Master
programme.desc: Captain N and Megaman are in Megaland trying to defeat Topman but when it was defeated Captain N and Megaman argue which dog was best Duke or Rush which gives Dr Wily an idea to stop the heroes while working on a peace robot

programme.title: Dungeons Dragons
programme.desc: Venger enslaved a gnome village with a powerful spell Only a gnome wizard Lukian can break the spell but Venger had trapped Lukian in a most unusual prison
